title: TenSura Light Novel Art Colorized using Style2Paints V4
tags: Style2Paints, That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
snippet: How I did itI used a tool called Style2Paints. It let’s you color line arts using AI. I used a lot of Human hints to fix a lot of the color problems that the initial painting has. I also used the colored cover of TenSura Vol. 5 as a Reference. The line art also comes from the Status Section of Te...

title: Why I moved to Jekyll.
